news.t: Checking the Style Box: Fidelity's Systematic ‘Beta-Plus' Lineup
Fidelity Expands Enhanced Suite With Mid- & Small-Cap ETFs
Fidelity® 'Enhances' ETF Lineup With Six New Active Equity Strategies and Reduced Pricing on Factor ETFs

holdings.infoBox: FMDE is an equity ETF with a total of 406 individual holdings. The top holdings are Western Digital stock at 2.24%, Sandisk at 1.48%, Howmet Aerospace at 1.30%, The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation at 1.22%, and Teradyne at 0.97%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Enhanced Mid Cap Core ETF (FMDE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in mid cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in US, mid-cap companies. Stock selection is based on computer-aided analysis, which chooses stocks belonging to the Russel Midcap Index. FMDE was launched on Dec 20, 2007 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.title: Fidelity® 'Enhances' ETF Lineup With Six New Active Equity Strategies and Reduced Pricing on Factor ETFs
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Fidelity announced the launch of six new active equity ETFs and reduced pricing on factor ETFs.
